meaning: n.驴子,笨蛋,顽固者,(=donkey engine)轻便发动机,(=donkey pump)辅助泵
examples: Time is like a wild donkey. Once it starts running, it never stops.
The donkey brayed and tried to bolt.
A mule is a cross between a horse and a donkey.
He gave the donkey a mighty prod in the backside.
In the midst of it all, a donkey bearing bundles of mint staunchly refuses to budge.
